recommendations.title: A Christmas Horror Story
recommendations.overview: Christmas is supposed to be a time of joy, peace and goodwill. But for some folks in the small town of Bailey Downs, it turns into something much less festive.
recommendations.director: Brett Sullivan, Grant Harvey, Steven Hoban

recommendations.title: Miraculous: Ladybug & Cat Noir, The Movie
recommendations.overview: After a guardian of magical jewels turns an awkward girl and a popular boy into superheroes, they can never reveal their identities — even to each other.

recommendations.title: Mavka: The Forest Song
recommendations.overview: Mavka, a Soul of the Forest, faces an impossible choice between love and her duty as Guardian of the Heart of the Forest when she falls for a human, a talented young musician named Lukas.

recommendations.title: Passion Play
recommendations.overview: An angel under the thumb of a ruthless gangster is saved by a trumpet player down on his luck.

recommendations.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
recommendations.overview: A struggling musician becomes a 12-year-old musical prodigy's guardian for a summer.

recommendations.title: Dashing Through the Snow
recommendations.overview: Eddie Garrick is a good-hearted man who has lost his belief in the wonder of Christmas. While spending time with his nine-year-old daughter Charlotte on Christmas Eve, he befriends a mysterious man in a red suit named Nick.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Hi, Mom
recommendations.overview: Devastated after her mom's serious accident and grief-stricken because she hasn't become the daughter she wanted to be for her mother, Jia Xiaoling finds herself transported back in time to the year 1981, where she meets her young mother before she w

recommendations.title: Journey to the Christmas Star
recommendations.overview: 13 year old kind-hearted Sonja arrives at a tiny village together with a company of bandits. But there is a curse on the village. A long time ago, the King’s only daughter Goldhair disappeared while searching for the Christmas Star. The Queen died of

recommendations.title: The Snow Sister
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose grieving family has forgotten about Christmas forms an unexpected, healing bond with a bubbly girl full of holiday spirit.
